languages.text: Себериан лишен клинка, и теперь ему будет легче увидеть свою истинную опору — свиту.

traits.locale_text: [ДРАФТ]Вы лишили Себериана меча. Остается надеяться, что это поможет изменить сиутацию.
Себериан лишен клинка, и теперь ему будет легче увидеть свою истинную опору — свиту.

languages.text: Now that Seberian's blade has been taken from him, it will be easier for him to see his retinue as a real source of support.
languages.original_text: Себериан лишен клинка, и теперь ему будет легче увидеть свою истинную опору — свиту.

traits.locale_text: Now that Seberian's blade has been taken from him, it will be easier for him to see his retinue as a real source of support.
Now that Seberian's blade has been taken from him, it will be easier for him to see his retinue as a real source of support.
Now that Seberian's blade has been taken from him, it will be easier for him to see his retinue as a real source of support.
Now that Seberian's blade has been taken from him, it will be easier for him to see his retinue as a real source of support.

languages.text: Nun, da Seberian seiner Klinge beraubt ist, wird es ihm leichter fallen, sein Gefolge als echte Unterstützung zu betrachten.
languages.original_text: Now that Seberian's blade has been taken from him, it will be easier for him to see his retinue as a real source of support.

traits.locale_text: Nun, da Seberian seiner Klinge beraubt ist, wird es ihm leichter fallen, sein Gefolge als echte Unterstützung zu betrachten.

languages.text: À présent que Seberian n'a plus sa lame, il lui sera plus aisé de voir l'utilité de son entourage.
languages.original_text: Now that Seberian's blade has been taken from him, it will be easier for him to see his retinue as a real source of support.

traits.locale_text: À présent que Seberian n'a plus sa lame, il lui sera plus aisé de voir l'utilité de son entourage.

languages.text: 既然塞贝里安的剑被夺走了，他就更有可能把自己的随从视为真正的依靠了。
languages.original_text: Now that Seberian's blade has been taken from him, it will be easier for him to see his retinue as a real source of support.

traits.locale_text: 既然塞贝里安的剑被夺走了，他就更有可能把自己的随从视为真正的依靠了。

languages.text: Ahora que Seberian ha perdido su espada, será más fácil que vea a su séquito como una verdadera fuente de apoyo.
languages.original_text: Now that Seberian's blade has been taken from him, it will be easier for him to see his retinue as a real source of support.

traits.locale_text: Ahora que Seberian ha perdido su espada, será más fácil que vea a su séquito como una verdadera fuente de apoyo.

languages.text: [ドラフトあなたは]セベリアンの[剣を奪った]。これで状況が変わることを願うばかりだ。
languages.original_text: [DRAFTYou have]deprived Seberian of his sword. We can only hope that this will help to change the situation.

languages.text: Seberian'ın kılıcı elinden alındığına göre maiyetini gerçek bir destek kaynağı olarak görmesi daha kolay olacaktır.
languages.original_text: Now that Seberian's blade has been taken from him, it will be easier for him to see his retinue as a real source of support.

traits.locale_text: Seberian'ın kılıcı elinden alındığına göre maiyetini gerçek bir destek kaynağı olarak görmesi daha kolay olacaktır.
